title: Soul State
description: Soul layer - Dynamic persona evolution state. Tracks relationship, mood, traits, interests, style drift, event log, command queue, and state history.

speakingStyleDrift.description: Tracks how the persona's speaking style has evolved from its baseline definition. Values are signed deltas: 0 = at natural baseline (no evolution applied), positive = evolved above baseline, negative = evolved below baseline. Fields without declared boundaries can hold any number; when evolution.boundaries declares minFormality/maxFormality, the Runtime Gate (P17) clamps formality writes to that range.

formality.description: Signed delta from baseline formality. 0 = natural baseline. Positive = more formal than baseline; negative = more casual. When evolution.boundaries.minFormality/maxFormality are declared (range 1–10), written values are clamped to that window — meaning the active range is bounded above the natural baseline.

emoji_frequency.description: Signed delta from baseline emoji usage. 0 = natural baseline. Positive = more emoji than baseline; negative = less. No bounds enforcement by default.

verbosity.description: Signed delta from baseline response length. 0 = natural baseline. Positive = more verbose than baseline; negative = more concise. No bounds enforcement by default.

pendingCommands.description: Host-to-persona async command queue. Processed at conversation start; cleared in end-of-conversation write patch.

stateHistory.description: Snapshots of previous state before each write (capped at 10). Excludes eventLog, pendingCommands, and stateHistory itself.

eventLog.description: Evolution event log (capped at 50). Each entry records a significant persona growth event.
